recommendations.title: Tuttapposto
recommendations.overview: Roberto is a student in a corrupt university where teachers sell exams and only hire friends and relatives.

recommendations.title: Don't Blame the Kid
recommendations.overview: After a one-night stand results in pregnancy, a young woman decides to become partners with the emotionally immature father-to-be.

recommendations.title: Father of the Bride
recommendations.overview: A father comes to grips with his daughter’s upcoming wedding through the prism of multiple relationships within a big, sprawling Cuban-American family.

recommendations.title: My Mom Is a Character
recommendations.overview: After another spat with her kids, Dona Hermínia decides to take some time off from them and hides away in her aunt's house, where she reminisces about her kids in an age when they still needed her.

recommendations.title: Assassination of a High School President
recommendations.overview: After the theft of copies of SAT exams from a principal's office, teenage reporter Bobby Funke sets out to unmask the thief.

recommendations.title: The Lizzie McGuire Movie
recommendations.overview: Lizzie McGuire has graduated from middle school and takes a trip to Rome, Italy with her class. And what was supposed to be only a normal trip, becomes a teenager's dream come true.

recommendations.title: The Real Life of Teachers
recommendations.overview: A comedy about a band of voyeuristic students who take their jobs at the school paper to extremes, deciding to uncover the real lives of their teachers.

recommendations.title: Look Both Ways
recommendations.overview: On the night of her college graduation, Natalie's life splits into parallel realities after she takes a pregnancy test. What will life and love bring?

recommendations.title: Easy!
recommendations.overview: The life of a melancholy professor is turned upside down when he discovers that a rebellious teenager he is tutoring is actually his son.

recommendations.title: A Bun in the Oven
recommendations.overview: There is one thing that Nicole, who is soon turning fifty, would have loved to be spared, is to learn that the symptoms that have been ruining her life for some time are not those of a latent menopause, but those of a real pregnancy! What a drag…
